# Nov 12 2002 at 2:59 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
Nope, 7ac, 7sv cold, that's it. Baybe you're thinking of another item.
▲ Page top
wearable races
QuoteReply
# Feb 11 2002 at 2:24 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591774117885
27 posts
The first time I tried to put one of these on my Iksar monk, I got the message that it couldn't be equipped by my race/class/deity. Then my friend handed me another one that was ALL/ALL that I was able to equip. I played with that for two levels, then just now I died, and when I went to loot my corpse, I couldn't re-equip it. Very strange and somewhat annoying. Why did they take Iksar off the list of classes?
▲ Page top
RE: wearable races
QuoteReply
# Feb 03 2003 at 11:56 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591766275047
Scholar
87 posts
Maybe they made it everyone but Iksar because the Ring of Scale, and most dragons that I've ever heard of, dislike Iksars and this IS supposed to be a symbol of loyalty to Vox?
▲ Page top
RE: wearable races
QuoteReply
# Nov 12 2002 at 2:46 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
Pre-Kunark, this was all/all. When Kunark came out and iksar were added, they started to retroactively change these to all classes, all races except iksar. Nice of them.

Likely what happened to you was they decided that iksar who already had it equipped could continue wearing it, but as soon as it was de-equipped it would convert to non-iksar wearable only. Unfortunately, when you die, it's de-equipped... looting it off your corpse, you wouldn't be able to put it back on. Basically what happened is they first changed the new symbols that hadn't dropped yet to non-iksar, then they started retroactively changing the old symbols too all but iksar. The one you were given was aparently an old one that dropped before the change that they hadn't got around to converting yet.

I seriously don't know what their logic was in removing iksar from this item... and it can't just be because it's plate, because then they'd have to remove int casters, druids, shamans, and monks from it too... which they didn't. Just iksar.

Every once is a while Verant just decides to whack people with the nerf bat, who knows why? Maybe their logic was that iksar need to be "balanced" against some of their natural advantages, who knows.

Edited, Tue Nov 12 02:31:52 2002
▲ Page top
RE: wearable races
QuoteReply
# Feb 12 2002 at 6:20 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593361835338
49 posts
Iksar aren't supposed to wear plate. Sort of silly but thats the reason they cant wear this bracer. Sorry my reptilian friends. :(

Futen
Mad Chanter
Torvon
▲ Page top
RE: wearable races
QuoteReply
# Jul 28 2002 at 2:03 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591780616741
17 posts
True lizards arnt supposed to wear plate but then again, neither are pure casters =-)

±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±±

37th season Magician Cazzter
▲ Page top
RE: wearable races
QuoteReply
# Oct 12 2002 at 12:40 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
Weird, huh? You're right, iksars can't wear plate... but neither can pure casters, druids, shaman, beastlords, or monks... but all of them can wear this bracer, unless they're iksar. All classes can wear it, and all races but iksar... that was nice of them, since iksar have the lowest base cold resistance of any race, and have the most need for it, isn't it?! Oh well.

Gave it to my enchanter, who can wear it, despite it supposedly being plate.
▲ Page top
Races
QuoteReply
# Oct 24 2001 at 8:44 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592249478566

84 posts
Looks like all but Iksar unless I'm missing someone.

And of course my main is an Iksar and I got one while camping the Coronet for the purple headband. It's a nice item and I'd wear it if I could.
▲ Page top
RE: Races
QuoteReply
# Oct 12 2002 at 12:45 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
Hehe, nope you're not. All classes and all races, except iksar, can wear this.

I got this while we were preparing for a Vox raid, my first one. Amazingly, I lived! However nothing a monk could use dropped from Vox. Only things I got were this, the Zaharn's Coronet, and a Silvery War Axe, all from the goblins we had to ocassionally fight off while outside the chamber preparing to take on Vox.

Scholar
748 posts
Well this item originally was all/all, in the days before iksar, vah shir, and beastlords existed. When Kunark came out, they changed all races to all races except iksar (thanks! Give us low cold resistance and exclude as from a cr item that everyone else can wear!). When Luclin came out, they added vah shir to the races too... but still wouldn't let iksar wear it. Oh well.
